page_metadata.biotools__summary: Integrated feature-based webserver in silico prediction of protease substrates and their cleavage sites for 38 different protease types, covering four major protease families: Aspartic (A), Cysteine (C), Metallo (M) and Serine (S).
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Integrated feature-based webserver in silico prediction of protease substrates and their cleavage sites for 38 different protease types, covering four major protease families: Aspartic (A), Cysteine (C), Metallo (M) and Serine (S).
